review_title: A fast way to build a website for a podcast
description: This was the best choice for sharing my content.
author: Anna K.
pros: I needed a simple way to create a website for my podcast, so I used this tool for it. I picked one of their templates, customized it, and added all my episodes with detailed descriptions and even videos for each episode. Setting up the navigation was pretty simple, which I really liked. Everything runs smoothly, and I didn’t have to deal with any complicated setups.
cons: Didn't find any. Everything worked smoothly for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Very impressed with SpreadSimple
description: Overall very pleased. It eliminates the need for mySql or other sql solutions to turn a database into a list display.
author: Ty H.
pros: SpreadSimple is an amazing product. I've been a software developer since 1976 and rarely do I use a tool that I think was well designed and that just works. SpreadSimple is easy to use and ideal for creating a data-driven site using gsheets as the data source. You can use it to create an entire multi-page site or just embed it's gsheet to display list into an existing site with one line of html. Complete with filtering, searching and sorting.
cons: It doesn't appear to provide a way to bring up a message window by clicking on one of the data elements. Support can take days to get a response.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: comment spotlight
description: 1. Use Google Sheet to make daily work more efficient and easy to work together. You can easily create, edit and share spreadsheets, tables, etc., and you can easily collaborate with colleagues online and update data at any time.意外的泄露。2. What needs improvement is that when creating complex reports and charts, you need to learn more about the use of complex functions. In addition, a high degree of confidentiality and security of data needs to be maintained to avoid accidental disclosure.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Google Sheets is a powerful cloud-based spreadsheet tool that's easy to use and free. It presents data and graphs quickly and clearly in the same worksheet, which makes editing and sharing easier than traditional spreadsheets.
cons: The disadvantage is that it requires a stable network connection, and sometimes it may take a long time to load. In addition, its function is relatively simple, suitable for processing a small amount of data.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: SpreadSimple's Real-time syncing is the number one feature for me
author: Walt N.
pros: Any changes made in your Google Sheet (like inventory updates) are instantly pushed to your website. I really enjoy that SpreadSimple harnesses the simplicity and flexibility of Google Sheets for inventory and content management, making it easy to launch a feature-rich website, whether for a small business, product catalog, menu, directory, or any other list-style content, without needing technical expertise.
cons: Free account has several limitations that cannot be tested until you pay, I think. Otherwise, all is good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Probably the easiest way to start your online store and directory page
description: Very good
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SpreadSimple is such a great tool with a clean UI and great UX that allows you to build an e-commerce website, retail estate listing, car-for-sale listing, job listing, video listing, etc. just from your Google sheets. Initially, I couldn't believe it myself so I bought a code to give it a try! It is quite easy to use and it allows you to create a professional-looking website that you can use to list & sell your products and any listings that you wish to publish.
cons: Better page loading performance - the websites are painfully slow to load! I'm based in Asia (Philippines) so it could be the distance to the SpreadSimple server that is causing this issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Does what it promises to do and does it great - launch websites from Google Sheets in a jiffy
description: - I have used SpreadSimple for an experimental side project of mine where it picks up from a spreadsheet I have and builds a website out of it using the fields mapped. Given it's an e-commerce site, SpreadSimple was the perfect choice for it as very few nocode tools can build sites from Google Sheets without having you pay a fortune before you can even validate your idea
author: Lakshmi Narayanan G.
pros: - I can bring my own sheets rather than being confined to a predefined template - Mapping the fields on my sheet to the fields in the app - Live reload, update your sheet and it's updated on the site within seconds - Great support - I reached out well past midnight and yet, I got quick support from the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] himself - Roadmap - Spreadsimple has a great roadmap planned for making e-commerce sites from Google Sheets a reality and I'm excited about the roadmap
cons: - Caching options: As it has to do live reload, the product does not offer any caching mechanism right now, which results in slower load times and lower scores in Pagespeed tests - Ecommerce focused: Spreadsimple is very e-commerce focused - what this means is the common use-case for building nocode sites, which is to build curated directories/lists, cannot be built with this product yet
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Spread Simple - simple but great
description: Today "speed and simple" means the world. And SpreadSimple has both.
author: Hoang P.
pros: Spread Simple is indeed very simple to use and deploy. I was so amazed to learn that with the ready-made templates of Spread Simple, I can create a website with thousand of items, including photos, descriptions, everything by simply inputting / importing into a Google Sheet. It is also so simple to change / edit / remove / add items, simply by revising the spreadsheet. With Spread Simple, I can create so so many websites to my liking, you name it: e-commerce, books, movies listing, restaurant menus - the only limit is my imagination.
cons: I would hope that Spread Simple has more and more templates. It would be greatly helpful for users who are busy (like me) to deploy it easier.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Web and Shop ON line ver y easy
description: Perfect, i like so much the app
author: Mónica D.
pros: It is ver y easy to créate a shop ON line as landing page or web site. I have created a real State web and a travel Packages in diferente destinations
cons: The formar from a sheet is still so simple. It is necessary to give you the option to create H1; h2… and afford more formats
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great and simple tool to put your web online
description: Just test it to check possibilities, you´ll be surprised for the ease of use and quickness to setup. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com. I´m selling, or making affiliates webs quicker than ever. With just a Google Sheet, you can focus on get traffic, not on the web.
author: Manuel M.
pros: Simplicity: just a Google Sheet and configure some options. Voilà, you have a good-looking web ready to sell :) You have the option to load your scripts, configure styles, appearance, and with a simple and intuitive interface.
cons: I Think nothing is what i dislike... probably I miss some options, but are on the Roadmap to be ready soon :) In a near future, integrations with Paypal and other payment options will be available. Also, new pages, product pages, attributes... etc. Will be a great tool
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: So many possibilities
author: Manu D.
pros: Few days ago, spreadsimple was on appsumo. I bought 10 codes after testing it. It gives so many possibilities and the roadmap is very exciting too. Grab, together with this deal, the course Better sheets and it"ll give you tons of ideas!
cons: The only thing that is really a stupid idea in my point of vue is the google login and the fact that, even with 10 codes, there is no way to create sub-accounts! That's stupid when you know that plenty of sumolings are agencies.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great template for affiliate shops
description: Overall, my experience with SpreadSimple has been super easy and seamless. The platform is incredibly intuitive, and even when I ran into a minor challenge with setting up a custom domain, the support team quickly guided me through it. It's a hassle-free solution that makes website management effortless!
author: George R.
pros: I made an affiliate shop with SpreadSimple, and it was way easier than I expected. I just add my listings in a Google Sheet, and they show up on my website right away. No need to update things manually! The templates look nice, and I could change colors and layout to match my style. It just works, and that’s what I love about it.
cons: Setting up a custom domain was a bit tricky at first, but the support team helped me figure it out.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Spreadsimple is... just that, simple
description: My experience with Spreadsimple is very positive, but I don't expect more than it can give. I know that Spreadsimple is for building very simple websites and getting to market fast. If I want to do a bigger project, I have to change platform. I also use it to enrich the contents of a website built in wordpress and I like it a lot.
author: Dunia C.
pros: Spreadsimple allows you to create web pages based on Google spreadsheets. The system is extremely simple and in a very short time you can have a website online. It is a very good alternative to build directories or repositories of any kind. Spreadsimple can also be a good option to create an e-commerce and assess if a product can fit in the market.
cons: Spreadsimple is great, but it has the limitations of a website built on Google spreadsheets. For example, working on SEO has its limitations with this system. The current templates are limited, although I believe the team will continue to create new templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best bang for your buck for a superfast way to create a website from Google Sheets without code
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I used it to setup a very niche job board, just as a weekend project: - incredibly fast to setup (was up and running, incl custom domain in less than 1hr!) - price level is great for a hobby project of which I'm not sure how long it will last - AMAZING SUPPORT! Refat went way out of his way by helping me improve my Google sheet by adding some formulas that really powered up this whole site - very simple and straightforward, no frills
cons: - I guess it could have some more customizations regarding the type of fields that are displayed, and how/where they are displayed, but for my use case it's not really crucial.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A quick site builder for Google Sheets lovers !
description: I built a full delivery e business for a friend, in one hour including orders managements, whatsapp integration. Then i added Zapier and CRM integration in another 20 minutes. impressive
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the fact that you do 80% of the job at the Google Sheets level (even CSS classes) (The other 20% are related to design/layout or some integrations and have to be done from Spreadsimple backoffice) they offer "quick templates" (Google Sheets templates + layout template) such as e commerce web site, listing web site, restaurant (menu) web site etc. Relying on Google Sheet offers endless possibilities, specially if you combine with automations and API calls to automatically fill your Sheets. (Sheet automatically updated via API calls >>> web site automatically updated !) Support team is very friendly, reactive and skilled. they helped me find a workaround in the SKU=0 case in E commerce web site. Spreadsimple offers Webhooks for automation It has a native integration with Zapier too
cons: It lacks some feature for e commerce web sites such as discount codes, or filters (something like "only display product if sku < 1 ")
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Turn Idea into Real Project Simple and Fast
description: It's been great. It had a few shortcomings and features that were a bit lacking. But the team is making progress to perfect those areas. I can't say they push updates blazingly fast, but they are steadily pushing updates.
author: Matthew K.
pros: It's great that its data is connected to a google spreadsheet. You can make your website very quickly with the data you already have.
cons: Markdown is good, but I wish there was drag and drop type of builder. But then again, I can use other software to build the framework and embed spreadsimple to do the data part.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy and fast way to turn a Google Sheet into a website
description: With SpreadSimple I built a directory for our company’s internal use. The data included various information like images and links to external sources and SpreadSimple's card layout was a great solution to present everything in a more visual and aesthetic way. And it literally took no more than 20 minutes to set everything up so it appeared to be a great time-saver too.
author: Anastasia B.
pros: The speed and simplicity of use are quite impressive. The setting up process is quick and easy, and if the data is already stored in Google Sheets, only some customization is required. Also, there are various options for sorting and filtering which is quite helpful in dealing with big amount of data. The Google Sheet as CMS is another advantage as it allows managing the data right in the spreadsheet using all the formatting or formulas necessary, so it saves lots of time and doesn't require any special knowledge. Also, this way all the team members with the right to access can manage the content as well.
cons: Though all the templates look styled and appealing, all of them are driven to e-commerce which isn't my case exactly. It's not a deal-breaker as all the templates are easy to customize, but it would be nice to have some other options designed for directories and listings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SIMPLE but POWERFUL
description: I love spread simple is really really simple, i can creating website under 10 minutes
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: what i love from spreadsimple is easy to use, i can easy to create simple catalog for my customer, i miss the address field section, hopefully you adding this feature in the future. Thank you spread simple team for creating this awesome product!
cons: they need adding more feature like form integration, address field, and more template
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's Very Simple
description: SpreadSimple is very good for testing ideas. I made a directory for independent publishers to showcase their books. Within Android apps and Progressive Web Apps, I'm using SpreadSimple embedded as a widget to list online events. I'm also using it to list images, production details, and video trailers for an upcoming video streaming service.
author: Renato P.
pros: Simplicity: Prepare your Google Sheets data, choose a few options in the SpreadSimple panel and click publish. Need to change something? Just update your Google Sheet and the site updates instantly. If you have a more robust site, you can still embed SpreadSimple as a widget.
cons: If you need more customizations to better handle SEO or styling, you will have to work a little bit with CSS and probably need other tools, like QuickBlog or other integrations.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great website using Google Sheets integration
description: Overall, it's been a great experience helping a client easily build their website an maintain it for about the cost of hosting a website. I'm glad I got in on the Product Hunt deal.
author: Richard H.
pros: The software is simple to use. I used a Sushi sample template to create a website for a local Coffee shop. The integration with Google Sheets worked flawlessly. It's nice to see changes in Google Sheets shows up immediately on the website. The site will easily be able to maintained by my client with little to no help from me.
cons: For the description portion of the page creator, it would be nice to be able to enlarge the font and perhaps change the color of the font. Also, currently, any orders for items come in through an email. I'm told they are working on a PayPal integration.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, easy to use and quick ecommerce website builder
description: Fantastic! I was very impressed on the simplicity and easy of use to create a website in minutes, with super friendly support if you need help.
author: Jane M.
pros: SpreadSimple is super easy to create a website in minutes. On my first try, I had a website up in minutes. I just had to go through all the settings to align with my business model (which have easy to follow instructions) and I was there with a website. The instructions and tutorials were professional made and easy to follow, so a beginner to creating websites would have no problem following and have a website they are proud of. They also have the google spreadsheet populated with an example so all you have to do is change the details with your business products and you done. I have had to contact support a few times for my billing and had a few questions, which I got a super quick friendly reply to solving all of them. Totally recommend SpreadSimple to anyone who needs an ecommerce site created quickly and easily with no hassle or frustrations. Pricing suits all budgets as inexpensive for all the features you receive, compared to other ecommerce website options available.
cons: None so far. There was nothing I found working through the setup that I had a frustration with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy and awesome solution for faster side hustle projects and MVPs
description: Overall experience is good
author: Unesh G.
pros: Easy and fast deployment and realtime editing from google sheers is the thing which I liked most.
cons: The only thing i Liked least is that team is not keen to add more templates which if done can add more use cases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Really neat way to create and maintain a data-driven site!
description: so far it is so good - I am still learning it, but for certain applications it is a great tool!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Spread Simple is a pretty neat website builder - it uses a concept (new to me) building a site from a Google Sheet. This makes it very easy for a client to update and maintain - they don't have to learn a new CMS system.
cons: They definitely need more templates - if you were building a site that fits one of their templates then it is easy - it is much more difficult building a site that does not fit one of their templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Spread Simple : A simple CMS based on Sheets
description: I used Spread Simple to build a simple e commerce shop and was satisfied with my experience of the software. It took me 10-15 mins to setup and I was quickly able to experiment with the site. I think a few of the features which I require for my use case will coming in the next couple of weeks.
author: Anshul R.
pros: - I like the different number of options available to display the product specifications - The product is simple to use and easy to set up. - The themes are also nice and mobile responsive
cons: - I wish the form was editable. Right now, it's fixed. - I wish there was a product display page to go over more details.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple is an overstatement!
description: Refat and the team are super responsive and actively developing the product alongside their userbase 🙌
author: Martyn B.
pros: Out of all the Google Sheet site makers Spreadsimple is hands down the best way to get a simple store or directory online in half the time.
cons: It would be great to signup without connecting to Google first.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Spreadsimple gets better every month with their updates
author: Jason K.
pros: They are building a great, user-friendly product that allows for website and e-commerce at scale, with easy of use. I love it!
cons: I don't really have any cons to list, other than hoping they get more payment method app integrations in the near future.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
